case_title: YUAN HAN SHEN VS. JULIA MARIA PALACIOZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---EDMOND LUI. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SHEN, YUAN HAN AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOZ, JULIA MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEN, YUAN HAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALACIOZ, JULIA MARIA $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $154.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,154.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($79.90) SERVED JUL-07-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOZ, JULIA MARIA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOZ, JULIA MARIA
